title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: LA CLÍNICA DE NUESTRA SEÑORA DE GUADALUPE HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, contraceptives, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, mental health evaluations, and health education. 1495 Liberty Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Children and adults without health insurance. Individuals with health insurance may also schedule but will be charged the same prices as others. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 364-5818 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 364-5818 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: $65 per visit. Must pay in cash at time of service; labs and medication cost extra. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, Saturday 8am-3pm acupunture services only Services: Alternative Medicine Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Diabetes Screening General Medical Care Pap Tests Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA CLÍNICA DE NUESTRA SEÑORA DE GUADALUPE
